titles.title: Open the Eyes of My Heart

properties.verseOrder: V1 V1 V2 V1 V1 V2 V2 V3 V3 V3 V3 V3 V3

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Open the eyes of my heart, Lord Open the eyes of my heart I want to see You, I want to see You.

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: To see You high and lifted up Shining in the light of Your glory Pour out Your power and love As we sing holy, holy, holy.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Holy, holy, holy Holy, holy, holy Holy, holy, holy I want to see You.
